# Portable Office Cabin

> India's trusted manufacturer & supplier of portable cabins, container offices, prefab structures, shipping containers and labour accommodations. Custom-built solutions delivered across India in 7-15 days.

Based in Bangalore, Karnataka. We serve construction, infrastructure, IT and industrial projects in 40+ industrial hubs including Bangalore, Chennai, Hyderabad, Mumbai, Pune, Delhi NCR, Ahmedabad, Krishnagiri, Hosur, Coimbatore, Peenya, Bommasandra, Narsapura, SIPCOT, Sriperumbudur and Oragadam.

Contact: +91 97318 97976 · info@portableofficecabin.com

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview of products, trusted clients and services.
- [Products](/products): Full catalogue of portable cabins, container offices, prefab homes, security cabins and storage containers.
- [Rental Service](/rental-service): Rent portable cabins, site offices and toilet blocks with flexible terms.
- [Gallery](/gallery): Completed projects across India.
- [About Us](/about-us): Company history, manufacturing capability and team.
- [Contact](/contact): Phone, email, address and enquiry form.
- [Book Appointment](/book-appointment): Schedule a free consultation with our team.
- [Shipping & Delivery](/shipping): Pan-India delivery, lead times and installation details.
- [Warranty](/warranty): Product warranty terms and coverage.
- [FAQ](/faq): Common questions on customisation, installation and maintenance.
- [Blog](/blog): Guides on prefab structures, labour colonies and modular buildings.
